Valentine’s Day Charcuterie Board

Prep time
5m
Serves
8
Difficulty
Easy

Create a beautiful, share-worthy Valentine’s Day charcuterie board made for grazing and savouring together. This effortless spread features a delicious mix of cheeses, cured meats, and fresh fruits, perfect for an intimate celebration.

Recipe courtesy of Woolworths.


Ingredients

  • 6 slices prosciutto

  • ½ rockmelon, rind removed and cut into thin wedges

  • 8 slices Woolworths Jarlsberg cheese

  • ¾ cup Woolworths salted mixed nuts

  • 2 Woolworths sesame bagels, toasted and cut into wedges

  • ½ bunch small red radishes, trimmed and halved

  • 150g Woolworths Greek-style feta, cubed

  • 235g parmesan-stuffed green olives

  • 8 slices mild salami

  • 150g sliced leg ham

  • 200g red grapes

  • ½ bunch fresh basil, leaves picked

    • Aldi
    Coles
    Lakeside Fruit Barn
    Woolworths
    Method
    1
    Gently wrap each rockmelon wedge with a slice of prosciutto. Arrange the wrapped melon on a large serving platter.
    2
    Artfully place the remaining meats, cheeses, fruit, nuts, olives, bagels, and radishes around the platter, creating balance and variety.
    3
    Scatter fresh basil leaves over the board just before serving. Enjoy immediately.
    Occasion
    Lunch
    Dinner

    We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Jagera, Yuggera and Ugarapul peoples of Ipswich and Springfield, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Forest Lake Shopping Centre resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise Frist Nations peoples' longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
